description_long: This is a life-sized adult mannequin with a stylized, avant-garde fashion ensemble. The figure wears a dramatic, floor-length gown with exaggerated, layered ruffles and a voluminous train, split into two contrasting halves. The left side of the garment features a light, almost white fabric, while the right side is constructed from a deep, dark material, both adorned with large, sculptural folds. The dress is asymmetrical, with the ruffles creating a dynamic, flowing silhouette that extends from the shoulders down to the hem. The mannequin's arms are exposed, and the head is topped with short, neatly styled hair pulled back into a small bun. The overall appearance is striking and artistic, suitable for high-fashion or conceptual urban settings.
description: A mannequin dressed in an avant-garde, floor-length gown with dramatic ruffles and a split black-and-white design. The figure has exposed arms and short hair styled in a bun.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full asymmetrical ruffled gown, split into light and dark halves, with the dramatic train visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered ruffles and the flowing train extending behind, with the arm and side profile of the dress visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the voluminous train and the sculptural folds of the dress, as well as the back of the mannequin's head and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the contrasting dark half of the gown, the ruffled layers, and the train trailing behind, with the arm and side profile visible.
attribute_clothing_type: avant-garde floor-length gown with exaggerated ruffles and a voluminous train
attribute_hairstyle: short hair pulled back into a small bun
